name: Salmon Slices Baked in Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange serving size pieces of salmon in a buttered baking dish.
2. Season with salt and pepper. Pour in enough cream to leave the salmon slightly exposed.
3. Add bay leaf, cloves, onion slices, parsley, and thyme.
4. Bake at 400°F for 25 minutes, basting occasionally. Remove salmon and keep warm.
5. In a saucepan, melt butter and stir in flour. Gradually add 2 cups of the cream the fish was cooked in. Stir constantly until smooth and thickened.
6. Season with salt, pepper, and lemon juice. Simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Pour the sauce over the fish to serve. Garnish with lemon wedges, sliced cucumber, and sliced boiled eggs.
